name: aria-status
question: What is the ARIA instrumentation status of this project (surface present? endpoints reachable? foundation-layer healthy?)

schema.query_count_24h: integer (optional, ARIA MCP queries in trailing 24h)
schema.briefing: string (≤200 chars; what the session-start hook emits as [aria-status]; empty string suppresses the line)

freshness.note: Network probe is bounded to 300ms but typically completes in <50ms (loopback). The oracle is safe to invoke from the session-start hook (invoked in parallel with other every-session oracles).

fallback: Inspect .claude/aria.json (if present) for endpoint configuration. Probe http://127.0.0.1:14550/aria/health manually. Read the project's CLAUDE.md ARIA Pre-Ask Reflex section. Spec: ARIA-01 in docs/specs/SPECIFICATION.md.

provenance.note: Universal Starter Set member. Composes Leg A of ARIA's four-leg detection machinery (Phase 1 per DEC-26): the [aria-status] briefing line in session-start ORACLE BRIEFING. Reuses surface-detection logic from ui-surface-detector (ARIA-02). Probes the foundation-layer ARIA-07 contract endpoint (default: http://127.0.0.1:14550/aria/health). Gracefully absent — emits empty briefing string (suppressing the line) when no UI/runtime surface is detected.
